calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Correct Error In Rejecting Renewal Of Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-15-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Robert F. Cohen of the law offices of Robert F. Cohen (415.593.6672) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF'S ASSIGNEE SACOR FINANCIAL, INC.'S Motion To Correct Error In Rejecting Renewal Of Judgment is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. The court clerk is directed to issue a notice of renewal of judgment (EJ-195) with the notation on it that the renewal is effective as of June 20, 2016, the date the court previously erroneously rejected the application for renewal, although the 30 day objection period does not begin to run till service of the notice of renewal of the judgment. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org. (D302)
